title: clematoclethra scandens subsp. tomentella
intro: Clematoclethra scandens subsp. tomentella is a lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family Styracaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Clematoclethra scandens subsp. tomentella include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea that is traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
